series_metadata.series_description: Files pertaining to the Ohio Turnpike and Infrastructure Commission Storm Water Management Program, which encompasses various activities such as pollution prevention measures, roadway sweeping, removing litter from the turnpike roadways, illicit discharge detection and illicit discharge elimination.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Maintain file for 5 years or until expiration of permit. ; Electronic: Maintain file for 5 years or until expiration of permit., Paper: Trash ; Electronic: Delete
